chunks.text: Upgrading dhcp.eecs Friday, July 5 | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar Upgrading dhcp.eecs Friday, July 5 On Friday, July 5, from about noon to 2pm, we will be performing an OS upgrade for dhcp.eecs. During

be performing an OS upgrade for dhcp.eecs. During this time, DHCP service will be handled by our backup DHCP server, so there should be no significant interruption of service — but no new DHCP updates will be processed (i.e. new system network regist

will be processed (i.e. new system network registrations will not become effective until after the upgrade is complete). UPDATE [2024-07-05 | larsrohr ] The OS upgrade took longer than expected, but our backup DHCP server kept service functional for

our backup DHCP server kept service functional for the afternoon. We finished updating late afternoon, and restored dhcp.eecs to service by 5:30 pm. Resolved as of 2024-07-05 5:30pm Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and
